name: InitDB
docstrings: Initializes a SQLite database with a records table and seed data.
body:
db.execute(db_path, "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS records (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value REAL)")
db.execute(db_path, "INSERT OR IGNORE INTO records (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'alpha', 10.5)")
db.execute(db_path, "INSERT OR IGNORE INTO records (id, name, value) VALUES (2, 'beta', 20.0)")
db.execute(db_path, "INSERT OR IGNORE INTO records (id, name, value) VALUES (3, 'gamma', 30.75)")
"initialized"

name: QueryAll
docstrings: Queries all records from the database, ordered by id.
body: db.query(db_path, "SELECT * FROM records ORDER BY id")

name: QueryByName
docstrings: Queries records matching a specific name.

name: InsertRecord
docstrings: Inserts a new record and returns rows affected.
body: db.execute(db_path, "INSERT INTO records (name, value) VALUES (?, ?)", [name, value])

name: BatchInsert
docstrings: Inserts multiple records in a single transaction.

name: GetTables
docstrings: Returns a list of table names in the database.

name: GetSchema
docstrings: Returns column information for a table.

methods.name: run
methods.body:
think f"Initializing database at {db_path}"
let status = act InitDB(db_path: db_path)?
think f"Database status: {status}"

let tables = act GetTables(db_path: db_path)?
think f"Tables: {tables}"

let schema = act GetSchema(db_path: db_path, table: "records")?
think f"Schema has {len(schema)} columns"

let rows = act QueryAll(db_path: db_path)?
think f"Found {len(rows)} records"

let n = act InsertRecord(db_path: db_path, name: "delta", value: 40.25)?
think f"Inserted {n} row(s)"

let batch = act BatchInsert(db_path: db_path, records: [
    {name: "epsilon", value: 50.0},
    {name: "zeta", value: 60.5}
])?
think f"Batch inserted {batch} row(s)"

let all = act QueryAll(db_path: db_path)?
think f"Total records now: {len(all)}"

store memory.working["last_db"] = db_path
store memory.working["record_count"] = len(all)

Ok(all)
